note: Option A representative boards (Phase 0). pack_domains are domain-scoped (constellation pack scope), NOT verb-scoped — the expected verb is never injected, so survival is a genuine measurement. legal set = runtime_registry verbs whose domain in pack_domains; fed to compute_session_verb_surface via SemOsContextEnvelope::compute(). entity_state is a representative lifecycle state per board; the registry has only 5 verb files (22 blocks) declaring requires_states, so the state observer is expected to prune ~0 candidates for this corpus (a real Option-B-leaning signal, measured in Phase 3). [I2 2026-06-18] board-cbu-operational re-grounded on the CBU domain pack manifest (owned_verb_prefixes), replacing the corpus-derived domain union.

boards.description: CBU operational workspace — DOMAIN-MODEL-GROUNDED (I2 clean, 2026-06-18). pack = manifest owned_verb_prefixes [cbu.] + universal nav (session/view/agent); cbu-custody. dropped (0 verbs). NOT corpus-derived. entity_state is the uppercase cbu_overall_lifecycle operational state.
KYC case workspace — screening, UBO/control analysis, case lifecycle, red-flag handling within an open case.
Custody/Deal workspace — deal lifecycle, fund vehicles, share classes, settlement.
Onboarding intake workspace — onboarding lifecycle + GLEIF enrichment.
Document solicitation workspace — document request/verify/extract lifecycle.
Entity management workspace — natural/legal person CRUD and structure.
